title: Our Favorite Restaurant
content: Every month, Mia and Ben visited the same small Italian restaurant. The owner already knew their favorite table by the window. They always ordered pasta, shared a dessert, and talked for hours. It did not matter if they celebrated something special or just another ordinary Friday evening. The place felt like home because they filled it with happy memories. One night, Ben looked around the restaurant and smiled. “This will always be my favorite place,” he said. Mia laughed softly. “Mine too, because you're here.”
